title: Rousseauxia mandrarensis

The plant is endemic to Madagascar, a country located off the coast of East Africa. Rousseauxia mandrarensis is part of the genus Rousseauxia, which consists of several species of flowering plants. The classification of Rousseauxia mandrarensis helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
